standard.description: Balanced profile for routine migrations with core validation checks.
preflight_items: Review all manual-review CSV findings before publishing.
Run Canvas link validator after import and resolve broken links.
Verify quiz scoring, attempts, and item-bank behavior for migrated assessments.
If quizzes use item banks, confirm the banks are course-shared so the course coordinator can edit them.
Confirm rubric connection and ensure 'Use this rubric for grading' is enabled where required.
If videos came from the D2L media library, rehost them in course-owned Canvas Studio or another approved course-owned location and replace the embeds.
Check key content and assessments in mobile view before release.
Run Canvas accessibility checker on all edited pages.

strict.description: High-governance profile for policy-sensitive migrations with stricter template checks.
preflight_items: Review all manual-review CSV findings before publishing.
Resolve any unresolved template placeholders (Instructor Notes, 'Fill in text here', title placeholders).
Verify each IC page checklist includes the required Course Q&A closing bullet.
Run Canvas link validator after import and resolve broken links.
Verify quiz scoring, attempts, item-bank draw logic, and avoid Detect Multiple Sessions warning behavior.
If quizzes use item banks, confirm the banks are course-shared so the course coordinator can edit them.
Confirm rubric connection and ensure 'Use this rubric for grading' is enabled where required.
If videos came from the D2L media library, rehost them in course-owned Canvas Studio or another approved course-owned location and replace the embeds.
Check key content and assessments in mobile view before release.
Complete syllabus finalization and confirm CAD link alignment before release.
Run Canvas accessibility checker on all edited pages.
